heading: Firearms, fireworks, speeches, and objectionable language in the Supreme Court Building and grounds
label: 6134 Firearms, fireworks, speeches, and objectionable language in the Supreme Court Building and grounds
text: It is unlawful to discharge a firearm, firework or explosive, set fire to a combustible, make a harangue or oration, or utter loud, threatening, or abusive language in the Supreme Court Building or grounds.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)613440:13j., .Aug. 18, 1949, ch. 479, § 563 Stat. 617
